negative_findings: No WARN/ERROR cluster on wallet-service: replication lag < 50ms throughout.

event.message: Patient Zero reframe: operator flagged checkout-service, evidence points to payment-service.

service_flow.message: UpstreamTimeoutException on inventory-reserve → @Retryable reissued the whole method, re-running ledger.debit()
Second debit for same customer, fresh txn_id — no idempotency key enforced

suggested_promql_queries.rationale: Break out retry=true — the path hiding the duplicate-debit signal.
p99 from payment-service's perspective — reveals the 15s sidecar wall.
>1 change per txn_id is the smoking gun.
Proves checkout's latency spiked to 15s — matching the user spinner.
Pre-auto-round drift; would have surfaced duplicates if threshold tighter.
Rules out event-sourced projector as contributing cause.

event.message: jaeger.search(service=payment-service, tags={error:true, http.status:504}, limit=100)

Anomaly: checkout_payment_latency p95 — 1.8s baseline → 15.2s.

metric_anomalies[+].correlation_to_incident: Checkout waits 15s behind payment retry — explains user-visible spinner.

event.message: kubectl.describe(deploy/payment-service) + get events 4h
Negative control: payment_txn_success_ratio = 99.97% (unchanged). Duplicates count as successes — surface metric dashboards would not alarm.
3 anomalies surfaced. Retry-counter is the narrowest signal; Istio p99 is the timing source; checkout p95 is the user-visible symptom.
No deploys in 24h. Recent events: 4× BackOff on inventory-service istio-proxy (1 day old).
kubectl.get(pods, namespace=payments-prod, all)
jaeger.replay(trace_id=T-7f3a9c2e-0042) — validating pattern
All 9 services healthy. 18 pods Running, 0 crashlooping, 0 OOMKilled, 0 ImagePullBackOff.
istio.query_sidecar_metrics(inventory-service)
Identical pattern on a second trace for a different customer: two wallet-update spans, 15.2s apart.
Sidecar on inventory-service: upstream_cx_overflow elevated. Not an outage — a connection-pool-depth event.
Infrastructure ruled out. 4 negative findings. Bug is in code, not pods.
jaeger.batch_replay(complaint_trace_ids=[47 traces]) — exhaustive confirmation
Batch replay: 47 of 47 complaint traces show the double-wallets.UPDATE pattern.
Pattern confirmed 47/47 complaint traces. Bottleneck: istio-proxy.CONNECT inventory-service (15.003s p99).

envoy_findings.human_summary: Upstream request timeout at istio-proxy after 15s — sidecar connect wall reached.

pattern_findings.human_summary: 47/47 sampled traces show @Retryable reissuing the full method — mutation re-runs.
Inventory-service timeout dominates the request — 98% of wall time.

event.message: Trace analysis complete. Smoking gun: double wallets.UPDATE spans.
All 4 context agents complete. Initiating cross-checks.
cross_check.metrics_logs(divergence_keys=[service,exception_type])
metrics say `payment_txn_retry_total = 0` (no surface retries). logs show 47× `RetryAttempt=2`. That's a cardinality mismatch.
Divergence: metrics report 0 retries; logs show 47. Retry-counter wired to wrong span of the code.

divergence_findings[+].human_summary: metrics ↔ logs — 1 signal disagreement: retry-counter zeroed while log shows 47 retries

event.message: cross-check: metrics ↔ logs — 1 signal disagreement
cross_check.tracing_metrics(divergence_keys=[span_name,txn_id])
metrics count successful txns per txn_id. Tracing shows TWO wallets.UPDATE spans per txn_id. Our own instrumentation contradicts itself.
Divergence: metrics see 1 successful transaction per txn_id; traces see 2 wallet writes.

divergence_findings[+].human_summary: metrics ↔ tracing — 47 disagreements: same txn_id has 2 wallets.UPDATE spans

event.message: cross-check: tracing ↔ metrics — 47 signal disagreements
4 hypotheses under evaluation: H1 fraud-slow (71%), H2 istio-outage (58%), H3 retry-without-idempotency (82%), H4 wallet-replication-lag (41%).
Testing H1 (fraud-adapter). If true, latency distribution should be unimodal near 380ms.
REASON: H1 says fraud-adapter slowdown caused the incident.
prometheus.query_range(histogram_quantile(0.99, fraud_score_duration_seconds), window=4h)
OBSERVE: fraud-adapter distribution is bimodal — two peaks (140ms baseline, 380ms elevated). A unimodal shift would be consistent with H1; observed shape isn't.
REFLECT: contribution math: fraud ~240ms (2.7× baseline); istio ~14,863ms. fraud explains 1.6% of incident latency. H1 ruled out.
H1 eliminated: fraud-adapter accounts for 1.6% of incident latency — not load-bearing.
Testing H2 (istio outage).
REASON: H2 requires istio pods Unready or CrashLoop.
kubectl.get(pods, namespace=istio-system)
OBSERVE: all istio-system pods Ready; zero restarts. Sidecars healthy.
REFLECT: upstream_cx_overflow is a connection-pool-depth event, not an outage. H2 fails.
H2 eliminated: istio data plane healthy; the 504 is a configured 15s timeout, not a failure.
Testing H4 (wallet replication lag).
prometheus.query_range(wallet_replication_lag_ms, window=4h)
wallet replication lag <50ms throughout incident. No stale reads possible.
H4 eliminated: replication lag never exceeded 50ms.

hypotheses.elimination_reason: Istio data plane healthy; 504 is a configured timeout

elimination_log.reason: Istio data plane healthy; 504 is a configured timeout

event.message: Elimination round complete: H1, H2, H4 ruled out. H3 is the winner candidate (88% prov.).
Opening repos: zepay/payment-service, zepay/shared-finance-models, zepay/reconciliation-job.
github.clone(zepay/payment-service, ref=main)
ripgrep('@Retryable' in payment-service/src) — locating retry wrappers
Found @Retryable on PaymentExecutor.execute() — wraps BOTH ledger.debit() AND inventoryClient.reserve(). Retry re-runs the mutation.
The mutation (ledger.debit) has no idempotency-key. On retry, fresh txn_id → second row in ledger.txns.
github.clone(zepay/shared-finance-models)
open(shared-finance-models/Money.java:38)
Money.java stores `amount` as `double`. $87.41 + $87.41 = 174.81999999999999 (IEEE-754 drift).
github.clone(zepay/reconciliation-job)
open(reconciliation-job/src/reconcile/NightlyReconcile.py:88)
NightlyReconcile auto-rounds any drift < $0.02 — swallows duplicate-charge signals.
Three-bug stack confirmed. Primary: PaymentExecutor. Amplifier: Money. Suppressor: NightlyReconcile.

suggested_fix_areas.description: Add idempotency-key to ledger.debit; move mutation outside @Retryable.
suggested_fix_areas.suggested_change: Thread req.idempotency_key() → ledger.debit(customerId, amount, currency, idempotencyKey); retry only the reserve call.

suggested_fix_areas.description: Replace double with BigDecimal; enforce currency scale.
Lower auto-round threshold; escalate sub-cent diffs.
suggested_fix_areas.suggested_change: Drop threshold from $0.02 to $0.001; P3 alert for any drift > $0.001.

code_cross_repo_findings.evidence: Retry wrapper re-runs mutation without idempotency-key.
double-based Money arithmetic masks sub-cent duplicate drift.
$0.02 auto-round threshold swallows the duplicate-charge signal.

event.message: 3 defects across 3 repos. Primary: PaymentExecutor.java:127. Amplifier: Money.java:38. Suppressor: NightlyReconcile.py:88.
Critic ensemble activating. advocate, challenger, judge.
ADVOCATE: three independent signals — trace double-span, log retry-cluster, metric retry-counter — all point to the same defect.
advocate verdict: CONFIRMED (89%)
CHALLENGER: looking for failure modes — is attribution across all 47 complaints sound?
jaeger.replay(trace_ids=[control group, 5 non-complaint traces])
Some control traces don't have the double-span pattern. Evidence gap: subset of 47 may include card-network-side dupes.
challenger verdict: CHALLENGED (74%) — attribution uncertain on ~5/47.
JUDGE: even if 5/47 are card-network dupes, the code defect is independently proven. Recommend fix code now; reconcile attribution after.
judge verdict: CONFIRMED with caveat.

details.caveat: Per-customer attribution subject to post-fix audit

critic_verdicts.reasoning: Three independent signals converge on H3
Code defect independently proven; attribution refinement post-fix

event.message: Challenger dissent exceeds threshold. Triggering one re-investigation round.
Re-running with narrower window.

prometheus.query_range(payment_ledger_write_total{retry=true}, window=90m, step=15s)
OBSERVE: 15.3× baseline sustained in tight window. Not spurious.
REFLECT: attribution uncertainty doesn't affect the code defect. Confidence rebounds.
Confidence rebounded 74% → 92% after re-investigation.

hypothesis_result.confidence_reasoning: 3 independent signals; critic 2/3 confirmed; re-investigation rebounded

elimination_log.reason: Istio data plane healthy; 504 is a configured timeout

winner_critic_dissent.summary: 2/3 critics confirmed after re-investigation; caveat on per-customer attribution

event.message: Synthesizing verdict + blast-radius scope + signature-library lookup.
topology.impact_scope(patient_zero=payment-service, hypothesis=H3)
wallet_ledger.count_duplicate_debits(window=4h, hypothesis=H3)
Ledger: 47 duplicate-debit events detected in window.
signature_library.match(winner=H3, evidence=[retry,mutation,no_idempotency])
Signature match: retry_without_idempotency_key (89%). Seen in Stripe Q3-2024, Square Q1-2025.

signature_match.summary: Retry wrapper re-executes a mutating operation without an idempotency key.
signature_match.remediation: Add idempotency-key header to mutation endpoints; move the mutation outside the retry boundary; or introduce a transactional idempotency table keyed on (client_id, request_id).

severity_result.reasoning: Financial-integrity violation confirmed by wallet_ledger (47 duplicate-debit events in window) + regulatory reporting threshold crossed per compliance_rules.evaluate.

past_incidents.title: Cart items out of sync between Redis and Postgres projection

evidence: $0.02 threshold absorbs drift from Money.java float-math

event.message: Verdict landed. Non-idempotent retry under Istio sidecar timeout. Confidence 92%. Severity P1 — financial-integrity + social-media + regulatory.
Generating fix diffs across 3 repos.
generate_fix(repo=zepay/payment-service, file=PaymentExecutor.java:127)
Fix drafted for payment-service: idempotency-key threading + mutation outside @Retryable.
generate_fix(repo=zepay/shared-finance-models, file=Money.java:38)
Fix drafted for shared-finance-models: double → BigDecimal; breaking semver.
generate_fix(repo=zepay/reconciliation-job, file=NightlyReconcile.py:88)
Fix drafted for reconciliation-job: threshold $0.02 → $0.001; P3 escalation for sub-cent.

repos.fix_explanation: Add idempotency-key to ledger.debit; move mutation outside @Retryable.
Replace double with BigDecimal; deprecate .plus() without currency scale.
Lower drift threshold to $0.001; escalate sub-cent diffs as P3.
repos.diff:
@@ -82,10 +82,15 @@
-if abs(diff) < 0.02:
-    log.info(...)
-    continue
+if abs(diff) < 0.001:
+    continue
+if abs(diff) < 0.02:
+    log.warning("sub-cent drift"); alert_finance_oncall(P3)
+    continue
